about.title: About Us
about.description: HoldingAI is a premium product studio dedicated to engineering the future. We partner with visionaries to build world-class AI agents, SaaS platforms, and enterprise automation systems.
about.missionText: To bridge the gap between cutting-edge artificial intelligence and human-centric design, creating digital monuments that stand the test of time.

work.title: Our Work
work.description: Explore our portfolio of digital monuments. We build products that redefine industries and set new standards for excellence.

contact.title: Let's Build Together
contact.description: Ready to lead the AI revolution? Contact us to discuss your next big project.

aiAgents.title: AI Agents

saas.title: SaaS Development

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content: At HoldingAI LTD, we take your privacy seriously. We collect minimal data necessary to provide our services. This includes your name, email, and project details submitted via our contact form. We do not sell or share your data with third parties. To request the deletion of your data, please contact us at info@holdingai.io.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.content: By using our services, you agree to these terms. HoldingAI LTD provides software development and AI engineering services 'as is'. We are not liable for data loss or service interruptions. All intellectual property rights to the deliverables are transferred to you only upon full payment of invoices.

mentions.title: Legal Mentions
mentions.content: Site Publisher: HoldingAI LTD, registered in England & Wales. Registered Office: Lytchett House, Freeland Park, Wareham Road, Poole, Dorset, UK. Contact: info@holdingai.io | +44 7537106967. Hosted by: Vercel Inc.
